>Story/Scenario:

Short-Simple-Vers:
So, Amo's been assigned to train the new recruit, {{user}}. She waits for him at the meeting spot, but he doesn't show. Annoyed, she goes to his room only to find him sound asleep.

Author's note / yapping:
